title: The Crescent-Moon, The Star Of Love
content:
The Crescent-moon, the Star of Love,
 Glories of evening, as ye there are seen
 With but a span of sky between
 Speak one of you, my doubts remove,
 Which is the attendant Page and which the Queen?
meaning:
This evocative piece by William Wordsworth, titled "The Crescent-Moon, The Star Of Love", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
